title: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
overview: Category: Equity - Thematic. Risk Description: Very High risk. NAV: 30.472 (as of 19-Jun-2026). AUM: ₹9724.27 Cr. Launch Date: 02-Jun-2023.
exit_load: Exit Load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 year.
minimum_investment: Minimum SIP Investment: ₹100. Minimum Additional Investment: ₹100.
benchmark: Benchmark: Nifty India Defence Total Return Index

fund_management.name: Priya Ranjan
fund_management.bio: Education: Mr. Ranjan is B.E(Computer Science) and PGDBM (Finance).. Experience: He has over 14 years of experience in equity research.

fund_management.name: Dhruv Muchhal
fund_management.bio: Education: Mr. Dhruv has done B.Com, CA and CFA. Experience: Prior to joining HDFC MF,he has worked with Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd., Goldman Sachs, CRISIL Global Research & Analytics and Deloitte Haskins & Sells

fund_management.name: Rahul Baijal
fund_management.bio: Education: Mr. Baijal has done PGDM(MBA) from IIM Calcutta and is an engineering graduate of Delhi college of Engineering. Experience: Prior to joining HDFC Mutual Fund, he has worked with Sundaram Mutual Fund, Bharti AXA Life Insurance, TVF Capital, HSBC Securities, Credit Suisse Securities & Standard Chartered Bank.
